hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.claude/(agents|skills)/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"IMPORTANT: A file in .claude/agents/ or .claude/skills/ was just modified. You MUST run /git-sync-docs to update README.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and docs/git-agent-system.md to reflect the current agents and skills."}}'; fi; }
